# KidFriendlyEats

> Australian community directory of cafes, restaurants and venues where parents can eat and drink while their children play on-site.

## What we are

KidFriendlyEats is a parent-powered listing site for kid-friendly venues across Australia. Every listing is submitted by local parents and reviewed before going live. We focus specifically on places with:

- On-site indoor playgrounds
- Dedicated kids play areas with equipment
- Venues located directly next to a public playground
- Outdoor run-around space for kids
- Dedicated play centres with food/cafe

## Key pages

- [Home](https://kidfriendlyeats.space/) — search for kid-friendly venues near you
- [Search & map](https://kidfriendlyeats.space/search) — browse and filter by suburb, play type, and distance
- [Add a place](https://kidfriendlyeats.space/submit) — submit a new kid-friendly venue

## Data provided per venue

Each listing includes: venue name, full address, suburb, GPS coordinates, play area type, parent-written description, visitor tips, opening hours, website, photos, and community ratings across food quality, noise level, safety, cleanliness, parking & access, weather dependency, and age suitability.

## Coverage

Australia-wide, with a focus on Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, Perth, Adelaide and surrounding suburbs.

## About

Built by parents, for parents. Community submissions, admin-reviewed before publishing.
